{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Models/DTO/DtoMapper.cs","content":"namespace aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\npublic static class DtoMapper\n{\n    public static CasinoDTO ToDTO(this Casino casino) => new()\n    {\n        Id = casino.Id,\n        Name = casino.Name,\n        Address = casino.Address,\n        LicenseNumber = casino.LicenseNumber,\n        FoundedDate = casino.FoundedDate\n    };\n\n    public static GameDTO ToDTO(this Game game) => new()\n    {\n        Id = game.Id,\n        Name = game.Name,\n        Type = game.Type.ToString(),\n        MinBet = game.MinBet,\n        MaxBet = game.MaxBet,\n        Description = game.Description\n    };\n\n    public static PlayerDTO ToDTO(this Player player) => new()\n    {\n        Id = player.Id,\n        FirstName = player.FirstName,\n        LastName = player.LastName,\n        Email = player.Email,\n        DateOfBirth = player.DateOfBirth,\n        Balance = player.Balance\n    };\n\n    public static EmployeeDTO ToDTO(this Employee employee) => new()\n    {\n        Id = employee.Id,\n        FirstName = employee.FirstName,\n        LastName = employee.LastName,\n        Position = employee.Position,\n        Casino = employee.Casino?.ToDTO()\n    };\n\n    public static TableDTO ToDTO(this Table table) => new()\n    {\n        Id = table.Id,\n        TableNumber = table.TableNumber,\n        IsAvailable = table.IsAvailable,\n        MinBet = table.MinBet,\n        MaxBet = table.MaxBet,\n        Casino = table.Casino?.ToDTO(),\n        Game = table.Game?.ToDTO()\n    };\n\n    public static TransactionDTO ToDTO(this Transaction transaction) => new()\n    {\n        Id = transaction.Id,\n        Amount = transaction.Amount,\n        Type = transaction.Type.ToString(),\n        CreatedAt = transaction.CreatedAt,\n        Player = transaction.Player?.ToDTO()\n    };\n\n    public static ReservationDTO ToDTO(this Reservation reservation) => new()\n    {\n        Id = reservation.Id,\n        ReservedAt = reservation.ReservedAt,\n        Player = reservation.Player?.ToDTO(),\n        Table = reservation.Table?.ToDTO()\n    };\n\n    public static AttachmentDTO ToDTO(this Attachment attachment) => new()\n    {\n        Id = attachment.Id,\n        CasinoId = attachment.CasinoId,\n        FileName = attachment.FileName,\n        FilePath = attachment.FilePath,\n        ContentType = attachment.ContentType,\n        FileSize = attachment.FileSize,\n        CreatedAt = attachment.CreatedAt\n    };\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Bmx8rHhZCneMn9mTujZ581"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/CasinoApiController.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Models.DTO;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers.Api;\n\n[Route(\"api/casino\")]\n[ApiController]\npublic class CasinoApiController : ControllerBase\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _dbContext;\n\n    public CasinoApiController(CasinoDbContext dbContext) => _dbContext = dbContext;\n\n    /// GET /api/casino?q=vegas&foundedAfter=2010-01-01\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<CasinoDTO>>> Get(string? q, DateTime? foundedAfter)\n    {\n        var query = _dbContext.Casinos.AsQueryable();\n\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(q))\n        {\n            query = query.Where(c =>\n                c.Name.Contains(q) ||\n                c.Address.Contains(q) ||\n                c.LicenseNumber.Contains(q));\n        }\n\n        if (foundedAfter.HasValue)\n        {\n            query = query.Where(c => c.FoundedDate >= foundedAfter.Value);\n        }\n\n        var casinos = await query.ToListAsync();\n        return Ok(casinos.Select(c => c.ToDTO()).ToList());\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<CasinoDTO>> Get(int id)\n    {\n        var casino = await _dbContext.Casinos.FirstOrDefaultAsync(c => c.Id == id);\n        if (casino is null) return NotFound();\n\n        return Ok(casino.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<CasinoDTO>> Post([FromBody] CasinoInputDTO model)\n    {\n        var casino = new Casino\n        {\n            Name = model.Name,\n            Address = model.Address,\n            LicenseNumber = model.LicenseNumber,\n            FoundedDate = model.FoundedDate\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Casinos.Add(casino);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = casino.Id }, casino.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<CasinoDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] CasinoInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var casino = await _dbContext.Casinos.FirstOrDefaultAsync(c => c.Id == id);\n        if (casino is null) return NotFound();\n\n        casino.Name = model.Name;\n        casino.Address = model.Address;\n        casino.LicenseNumber = model.LicenseNumber;\n        casino.FoundedDate = model.FoundedDate;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return Ok(casino.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpDelete(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var casino = await _dbContext.Casinos.FirstOrDefaultAsync(c => c.Id == id);\n        if (casino is null) return NotFound();\n\n        _dbContext.Casinos.Remove(casino);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return NoContent();\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AV2asjTXaLRdSodYyFWMrg"}

q, GameType? type)\n    {\n        var query = _dbContext.Games.AsQueryable();\n\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(q))\n        {\n            query = query.Where(g =>\n                g.Name.Contains(q) ||\n                g.Description.Contains(q));\n        }\n\n        if (type.HasValue)\n        {\n            query = query.Where(g => g.Type == type.Value);\n        }\n\n        var games = await query.ToListAsync();\n        return Ok(games.Select(g => g.ToDTO()).ToList());\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<GameDTO>> Get(int id)\n    {\n        var game = await _dbContext.Games.FirstOrDefaultAsync(g => g.Id == id);\n        if (game is null) return NotFound();\n\n        return Ok(game.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<GameDTO>> Post([FromBody] GameInputDTO model)\n    {\n        var game = new Game\n        {\n            Name = model.Name,\n            Type = model.Type,\n            MinBet = model.MinBet,\n            MaxBet = model.MaxBet,\n            Description = model.Description ?? string.Empty\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Games.Add(game);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = game.Id }, game.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<GameDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] GameInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var game = await _dbContext.Games.FirstOrDefaultAsync(g => g.Id == id);\n        if (game is null) return NotFound();\n\n        game.Name = model.Name;\n        game.Type = model.Type;\n        game.MinBet = model.MinBet;\n        game.MaxBet = model.MaxBet;\n        game.Description = model.Description ?? string.Empty;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return Ok(game.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpDelete(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var game = await _dbContext.Games.FirstOrDefaultAsync(g => g.Id == id);\n        if (game is null) return NotFound();\n\n        _dbContext.Games.Remove(game);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return NoContent();\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_013Q9DiQitpgiBYtTNR6KRVw"}

PlayerApiController(CasinoDbContext dbContext) => _dbContext = dbContext;\n\n    /// GET /api/player?q=marko&minBalance=1000\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<PlayerDTO>>> PlayerInputDTO model)\n    {\n        var player = new Player\n        {\n            FirstName = model.FirstName,\n            LastName = model.LastName,\n            Email = model.Email,\n            DateOfBirth = model.DateOfBirth,\n            Balance = model.Balance\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Players.Add(player);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = player.Id }, player.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<PlayerDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] PlayerInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var player = await _dbContext.Players.FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.Id == id);\n        if (player is null) return NotFound();\n\n        player.FirstName = model.FirstName;\n        player.LastName = model.LastName;\n        player.Email = model.Email;\n        player.DateOfBirth = model.DateOfBirth;\n        player.Balance = model.Balance;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return Ok(player.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Models.DTO;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers.Api;\n\n[Route(\"api/employee\")]\n[ApiController]\npublic class EmployeeApiController : ControllerBase\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _dbContext;\n\n    public EmployeeApiController(CasinoDbContext dbContext) => _dbContext = dbContext;\n\n    /// GET /api/employee?q=luka&casinoId=1\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<EmployeeDTO>>> Get(string? q, int? casinoId)\n    {\n        var query = _dbContext.Employees.Include(e => e.Casino).AsQueryable();\n\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(q))\n        {\n            query = query.Where(e =>\n                e.FirstName.Contains(q) ||\n                e.LastName.Contains(q) ||\n                e.Position.Contains(q));\n        }\n\n        if (casinoId.HasValue)\n        {\n            query = query.Where(e => e.CasinoId == casinoId.Value);\n        }\n\n        var employees = await query.ToListAsync();\n        return Ok(employees.Select(e => e.ToDTO()).ToList());\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<EmployeeDTO>> Get(int id)\n    {\n        var employee = await _dbContext.Employees\n            .Include(e => e.Casino)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == id);\n\n        if (employee is null) return NotFound();\n\n        return Ok(employee.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<EmployeeDTO>> Post([FromBody] EmployeeInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (!await _dbContext.Casinos.AnyAsync(c => c.Id == model.CasinoId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.CasinoId), \"Casino ne postoji\");\n            return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n        }\n\n        var employee = new Employee\n        {\n            FirstName = model.FirstName,\n            LastName = model.LastName,\n            Position = model.Position,\n            CasinoId = model.CasinoId\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Employees.Add(employee);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(employee).Reference(e => e.Casino).LoadAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = employee.Id }, employee.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<EmployeeDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] EmployeeInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var employee = await _dbContext.Employees\n            .Include(e => e.Casino)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == id);\n\n        if (employee is null) return NotFound();\n\n        if (!await _dbContext.Casinos.AnyAsync(c => c.Id == model.CasinoId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.CasinoId), \"Casino ne postoji\");\n            return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n        }\n\n        employee.FirstName = model.FirstName;\n        employee.LastName = model.LastName;\n        employee.Position = model.Position;\n        employee.CasinoId = model.CasinoId;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(employee).Reference(e => e.Casino).LoadAsync();\n\n        return Ok(employee.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpDelete(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var employee = await _dbContext.Employees.FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == id);\n        if (employee is null) return NotFound();\n\n        _dbContext.Employees.Remove(employee);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return NoContent();\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0184WBU4ow5ZUHEc7Q1RnEGf"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/TableApiController.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Models.DTO;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers.Api;\n\n[Route(\"api/table\")]\n[ApiController]\npublic class TableApiController : ControllerBase\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _dbContext;\n\n    public TableApiController(CasinoDbContext dbContext) => _dbContext = dbContext;\n\n    /// GET /api/table?casinoId=1&gameId=2&available=true\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<TableDTO>>> Get(int? casinoId, int? gameId, bool? available)\n    {\n        var query = _dbContext.Tables\n            .Include(t => t.Casino)\n            .Include(t => t.Game)\n            .AsQueryable();\n\n        if (casinoId.HasValue) query = query.Where(t => t.CasinoId == casinoId.Value);\n        if (gameId.HasValue) query = query.Where(t => t.GameId == gameId.Value);\n        if (available.HasValue) query = query.Where(t => t.IsAvailable == available.Value);\n\n        var tables = await query.ToListAsync();\n        return Ok(tables.Select(t => t.ToDTO()).ToList());\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<TableDTO>> Get(int id)\n    {\n        var table = await _dbContext.Tables\n            .Include(t => t.Casino)\n            .Include(t => t.Game)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n\n        if (table is null) return NotFound();\n\n        return Ok(table.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<TableDTO>> Post([FromBody] TableInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (!await _dbContext.Casinos.AnyAsync(c => c.Id == model.CasinoId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.CasinoId), \"Casino ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!await _dbContext.Games.AnyAsync(g => g.Id == model.GameId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.GameId), \"Igra ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid) return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n\n        var table = new Table\n        {\n            TableNumber = model.TableNumber,\n            IsAvailable = model.IsAvailable,\n            MinBet = model.MinBet,\n            MaxBet = model.MaxBet,\n            CasinoId = model.CasinoId,\n            GameId = model.GameId\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Tables.Add(table);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(table).Reference(t => t.Casino).LoadAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(table).Reference(t => t.Game).LoadAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = table.Id }, table.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<TableDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] TableInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var table = await _dbContext.Tables\n            .Include(t => t.Casino)\n            .Include(t => t.Game)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n\n        if (table is null) return NotFound();\n\n        if (!await _dbContext.Casinos.AnyAsync(c => c.Id == model.CasinoId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.CasinoId), \"Casino ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!await _dbContext.Games.AnyAsync(g => g.Id == model.GameId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.GameId), \"Igra ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid) return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n\n        table.TableNumber = model.TableNumber;\n        table.IsAvailable = model.IsAvailable;\n        table.MinBet = model.MinBet;\n        table.MaxBet = model.MaxBet;\n        table.CasinoId = model.CasinoId;\n        table.GameId = model.GameId;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(table).Reference(t => t.Casino).LoadAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(table).Reference(t => t.Game).LoadAsync();\n\n        return Ok(table.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpDelete(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var table = await _dbContext.Tables.FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n        if (table is null) return NotFound();\n\n        _dbContext.Tables.Remove(table);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return NoContent();\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RbMFH1PjdzMGQ8wae6QuCF"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/TransactionApiController.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Models.DTO;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers.Api;\n\n[Route(\"api/transaction\")]\n[ApiController]\npublic class TransactionApiController : ControllerBase\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _dbContext;\n\n    public TransactionApiController(CasinoDbContext dbContext) => _dbContext = dbContext;\n\n    /// GET /api/transaction?playerId=1&type=Deposit\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<TransactionDTO>>> Get(int? playerId, TransactionType? type)\n    {\n        var query = _dbContext.Transactions.Include(t => t.Player).AsQueryable();\n\n        if (playerId.HasValue) query = query.Where(t => t.PlayerId == playerId.Value);\n        if (type.HasValue) query = query.Where(t => t.Type == type.Value);\n\n        var transactions = await query.ToListAsync();\n        return Ok(transactions.Select(t => t.ToDTO()).ToList());\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<TransactionDTO>> Get(int id)\n    {\n        var transaction = await _dbContext.Transactions\n            .Include(t => t.Player)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n\n        if (transaction is null) return NotFound();\n\n        return Ok(transaction.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<TransactionDTO>> Post([FromBody] TransactionInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (!await _dbContext.Players.AnyAsync(p => p.Id == model.PlayerId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlayerId), \"Igrač ne postoji\");\n            return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n        }\n\n        var transaction = new Transaction\n        {\n            Amount = model.Amount,\n            Type = model.Type,\n            CreatedAt = model.CreatedAt,\n            PlayerId = model.PlayerId\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Transactions.Add(transaction);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(transaction).Reference(t => t.Player).LoadAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = transaction.Id }, transaction.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<TransactionDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] TransactionInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var transaction = await _dbContext.Transactions\n            .Include(t => t.Player)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n\n        if (transaction is null) return NotFound();\n\n        if (!await _dbContext.Players.AnyAsync(p => p.Id == model.PlayerId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlayerId), \"Igrač ne postoji\");\n            return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n        }\n\n        transaction.Amount = model.Amount;\n        transaction.Type = model.Type;\n        transaction.CreatedAt = model.CreatedAt;\n        transaction.PlayerId = model.PlayerId;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(transaction).Reference(t => t.Player).LoadAsync();\n\n        return Ok(transaction.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpDelete(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var transaction = await _dbContext.Transactions.FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n        if (transaction is null) return NotFound();\n\n        _dbContext.Transactions.Remove(transaction);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return NoContent();\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01ShQPdhu2aYLUC6yx3DU4eL"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/ReservationApiController.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Models.DTO;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers.Api;\n\n[Route(\"api/reservation\")]\n[ApiController]\npublic class ReservationApiController : ControllerBase\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _dbContext;\n\n    public ReservationApiController(CasinoDbContext dbContext) => _dbContext = dbContext;\n\n    /// GET /api/reservation?playerId=1&tableId=2&from=2024-04-01\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<ReservationDTO>>> Get(int? playerId, int? tableId, DateTime? from)\n    {\n        var query = _dbContext.Reservations\n            .Include(r => r.Player)\n            .Include(r => r.Table).ThenInclude(t => t.Casino)\n            .Include(r => r.Table).ThenInclude(t => t.Game)\n            .AsQueryable();\n\n        if (playerId.HasValue) query = query.Where(r => r.PlayerId == playerId.Value);\n        if (tableId.HasValue) query = query.Where(r => r.TableId == tableId.Value);\n        if (from.HasValue) query = query.Where(r => r.ReservedAt >= from.Value);\n\n        var reservations = await query.ToListAsync();\n        return Ok(reservations.Select(r => r.ToDTO()).ToList());\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<ReservationDTO>> Get(int id)\n    {\n        var reservation = await _dbContext.Reservations\n            .Include(r => r.Player)\n            .Include(r => r.Table).ThenInclude(t => t.Casino)\n            .Include(r => r.Table).ThenInclude(t => t.Game)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(r => r.Id == id);\n\n        if (reservation is null) return NotFound();\n\n        return Ok(reservation.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<ReservationDTO>> Post([FromBody] ReservationInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (!await _dbContext.Players.AnyAsync(p => p.Id == model.PlayerId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlayerId), \"Igrač ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!await _dbContext.Tables.AnyAsync(t => t.Id == model.TableId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.TableId), \"Stol ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid) return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n\n        var reservation = new Reservation\n        {\n            ReservedAt = model.ReservedAt,\n            PlayerId = model.PlayerId,\n            TableId = model.TableId\n        };\n\n        _dbContext.Reservations.Add(reservation);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(reservation).Reference(r => r.Player).LoadAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(reservation).Reference(r => r.Table).LoadAsync();\n\n        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(Get), new { id = reservation.Id }, reservation.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<ReservationDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] ReservationInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var reservation = await _dbContext.Reservations\n            .Include(r => r.Player)\n            .Include(r => r.Table)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(r => r.Id == id);\n\n        if (reservation is null) return NotFound();\n\n        if (!await _dbContext.Players.AnyAsync(p => p.Id == model.PlayerId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlayerId), \"Igrač ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!await _dbContext.Tables.AnyAsync(t => t.Id == model.TableId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.TableId), \"Stol ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid) return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n\n        reservation.ReservedAt = model.ReservedAt;\n        reservation.PlayerId = model.PlayerId;\n        reservation.TableId = model.TableId;\n\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(reservation).Reference(r => r.Player).LoadAsync();\n        await _dbContext.Entry(reservation).Reference(r => r.Table).LoadAsync();\n\n        return Ok(reservation.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpDelete(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var reservation = await _dbContext.Reservations.FirstOrDefaultAsync(r => r.Id == id);\n        if (reservation is null) return NotFound();\n\n        _dbContext.Reservations.Remove(reservation);\n        await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        return NoContent();\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_017tiP1KKEWeXeiq3GnMxGKH"}

{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/CasinoApiFactory.cs","content":"using System.Security.Claims;\nusing System.Text.Encodings.Web;\nusing aspnet.Data;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Extensions;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Options;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Pokreće stvarnu aplikaciju s InMemory bazom (jedinstvenom po factory instanci)\n/// i test autentikacijskom shemom upravljanom preko \"X-Test-Role\" headera.\n/// </summary>\npublic class CasinoApiFactory : WebApplicationFactory<Program>\n{\n    private readonly string _dbName = $\"CasinoTests-{Guid.NewGuid()}\";\n\n    protected override void ConfigureWebHost(IWebHostBuilder builder)\n    {\n        builder.UseEnvironment(\"Testing\");\n\n        builder.ConfigureAppConfiguration((_, config) =>\n        {\n            config.AddInMemoryCollection(new Dictionary<string, string?>\n            {\n                [\"ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection\"] = \"TestConnection\"\n            });\n        });\n\n        builder.ConfigureServices(services =>\n        {\n            // SQL Server registraciju zamijeniti InMemory bazom\n            services.RemoveAll(typeof(DbContextOptions<CasinoDbContext>));\n            services.RemoveAll(typeof(IDbContextOptionsConfiguration<CasinoDbContext>));\n\n            services.AddDbContext<CasinoDbContext>(options =>\n                options.UseInMemoryDatabase(_dbName));\n\n            // Test autentikacija umjesto Identity cookieja\n            services.AddAuthentication()\n                .AddScheme<AuthenticationSchemeOptions, TestAuthHandler>(TestAuthHandler.SchemeName, _ => { });\n\n            services.PostConfigure<AuthenticationOptions>(options =>\n            {\n                options.DefaultAuthenticateScheme = TestAuthHandler.SchemeName;\n                options.DefaultChallengeScheme = TestAuthHandler.SchemeName;\n            });\n        });\n    }\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Autenticira zahtjev samo ako sadrži \"X-Test-Role\" header; bez headera vraća 401.\n/// </summary>\npublic class TestAuthHandler : AuthenticationHandler<AuthenticationSchemeOptions>\n{\n    public const string SchemeName = \"Test\";\n    public const string RoleHeader = \"X-Test-Role\";\n\n    public TestAuthHandler(\n        IOptionsMonitor<AuthenticationSchemeOptions> options,\n        ILoggerFactory logger,\n        UrlEncoder encoder)\n        : base(options, logger, encoder)\n    {\n    }\n\n    protected override Task<AuthenticateResult> HandleAuthenticateAsync()\n    {\n        if (!Request.Headers.TryGetValue(RoleHeader, out var role) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(role))\n        {\n            return Task.FromResult(AuthenticateResult.NoResult());\n        }\n\n        var claims = new[]\n        {\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Name, \"test-user\"),\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Role, role.ToString())\n        };\n\n        var identity = new ClaimsIdentity(claims, SchemeName);\n        var ticket = new AuthenticationTicket(new ClaimsPrincipal(identity), SchemeName);\n\n        return Task.FromResult(AuthenticateResult.Success(ticket));\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_012HR8XCfjQvmthQHp9WLcR2"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/CasinoApiFactory.cs","old_string":"using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;","new_string":"using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DQs2D3ubH8sA3HkhzEtbpT"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/ApiTestBase.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic abstract class ApiTestBase : IClassFixture<CasinoApiFactory>\n{\n    protected readonly CasinoApiFactory Factory;\n\n    /// Klijent bez autentikacije\n    protected readonly HttpClient Client;\n\n    /// Klijent s rolom Admin\n    protected readonly HttpClient AdminClient;\n\n    /// Klijent s rolom Manager\n    protected readonly HttpClient ManagerClient;\n\n    protected ApiTestBase(CasinoApiFactory factory)\n    {\n        Factory = factory;\n        Client = factory.CreateClient();\n\n        AdminClient = factory.CreateClient();\n        AdminClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add(TestAuthHandler.RoleHeader, \"Admin\");\n\n        ManagerClient = factory.CreateClient();\n        ManagerClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add(TestAuthHandler.RoleHeader, \"Manager\");\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<T> WithDbAsync<T>(Func<CasinoDbContext, Task<T>> action)\n    {\n        using var scope = Factory.Services.CreateScope();\n        var dbContext = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<CasinoDbContext>();\n        return await action(dbContext);\n    }\n\n    // ── Pomoćne metode za pripremu podataka ──────────────────────────────────\n\n    protected Task<Casino> CreateCasinoAsync() => WithDbAsync(async db =>\n    {\n        var casino = new Casino\n        {\n            Name = $\"Test Casino {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n            Address = \"Testna ulica 1, Zagreb\",\n            LicenseNumber = $\"HR-TST-{Random.Shared.Next(1000, 9999)}\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2015, 1, 1)\n        };\n        db.Casinos.Add(casino);\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return casino;\n    });\n\n    protected Task<Game> CreateGameAsync() => WithDbAsync(async db =>\n    {\n        var game = new Game\n        {\n            Name = $\"Test Game {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n            Type = GameType.Blackjack,\n            MinBet = 10,\n            MaxBet = 500,\n            Description = \"Testna igra\"\n        };\n        db.Games.Add(game);\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return game;\n    });\n\n    protected Task<Player> CreatePlayerAsync() => WithDbAsync(async db =>\n    {\n        var player = new Player\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Test\",\n            LastName = $\"Player {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n            Email = $\"test-{Guid.NewGuid():N}@mail.com\",\n            DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1990, 1, 1),\n            Balance = 1000\n        };\n        db.Players.Add(player);\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return player;\n    });\n\n    protected async Task<Employee> CreateEmployeeAsync(int? casinoId = null)\n    {\n        casinoId ??= (await CreateCasinoAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var employee = new Employee\n            {\n                FirstName = \"Test\",\n                LastName = $\"Employee {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n                Position = \"Dealer\",\n                CasinoId = casinoId.Value\n            };\n            db.Employees.Add(employee);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return employee;\n        });\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<Table> CreateTableAsync(int? casinoId = null, int? gameId = null)\n    {\n        casinoId ??= (await CreateCasinoAsync()).Id;\n        gameId ??= (await CreateGameAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var table = new Table\n            {\n                TableNumber = Random.Shared.Next(1, 1000),\n                IsAvailable = true,\n                MinBet = 10,\n                MaxBet = 500,\n                CasinoId = casinoId.Value,\n                GameId = gameId.Value\n            };\n            db.Tables.Add(table);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return table;\n        });\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<Transaction> CreateTransactionAsync(int? playerId = null)\n    {\n        playerId ??= (await CreatePlayerAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var transaction = new Transaction\n            {\n                Amount = 100,\n                Type = TransactionType.Deposit,\n                CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 5, 1),\n                PlayerId = playerId.Value\n            };\n            db.Transactions.Add(transaction);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return transaction;\n        });\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<Reservation> CreateReservationAsync(int? playerId = null, int? tableId = null)\n    {\n        playerId ??= (await CreatePlayerAsync()).Id;\n        tableId ??= (await CreateTableAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var reservation = new Reservation\n            {\n                ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 6, 1, 20, 0, 0),\n                PlayerId = playerId.Value,\n                TableId = tableId.Value\n            };\n            db.Reservations.Add(reservation);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return reservation;\n        });\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0159ZawEnAzwTHeN74C4UdNY"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/GlobalUsings.cs","content":"global using System.Net;\nglobal using System.Net.Http.Json;\nglobal using FluentAssertions;\nglobal using Xunit;\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01A2m8AWKn514Zo6bJimFgqh"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/CasinoApiTests.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class CasinoApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public CasinoApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/casino\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<CasinoDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(c => c.Id == casino.Id && c.Name == casino.Name);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithQuery_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/casino?q={casino.LicenseNumber}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<CasinoDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().OnlyContain(c => c.LicenseNumber == casino.LicenseNumber);\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnCasino_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CasinoDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(casino.Id);\n        dto.Name.Should().Be(casino.Name);\n        dto.Address.Should().Be(casino.Address);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/casino/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateCasino_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Novi Casino\",\n            Address = \"Nova adresa 5, Osijek\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-NEW-100\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 3, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CasinoDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Name.Should().Be(model.Name);\n\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Casinos.Any(c => c.Id == dto.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeTrue();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        var model = new { Address = \"Bez naziva 1\" };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Anonimni Casino\",\n            Address = \"Adresa 1\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-ANON-1\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 1, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateCasino()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = casino.Id,\n            Name = \"Izmijenjeni naziv\",\n            Address = casino.Address,\n            LicenseNumber = casino.LicenseNumber,\n            FoundedDate = casino.FoundedDate\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CasinoDTO>();\n        dto!.Name.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjeni naziv\");\n\n        var dbName = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Casinos.Find(casino.Id)!.Name));\n        dbName.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjeni naziv\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Nepostojeći\",\n            Address = \"Adresa 1\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-X-1\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 1, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino/999999\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn400_WhenIdMismatch()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = casino.Id + 1,\n            Name = \"Mismatch\",\n            Address = \"Adresa 1\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-X-2\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 1, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemoveCasino_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Casinos.Any(c => c.Id == casino.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync(\"/api/casino/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn403_WhenManager()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await ManagerClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Forbidden);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_011QduQ1AneP5eGtHusdTCBs"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/GameApiTests.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class GameApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public GameApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/game\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<GameDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(g => g.Id == game.Id && g.Name == game.Name);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithQuery_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        await CreateGameAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/game?q={game.Name}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<GameDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(game.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnGame_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/game/{game.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<GameDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(game.Id);\n        dto.Type.Should().Be(game.Type.ToString());\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/game/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateGame_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var model = new GameInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Nova igra\",\n            Type = aspnet.Models.GameType.Roulette,\n            MinBet = 5,\n            MaxBet = 200,\n            Description = \"Opis nove igre\"\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/game\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<GameDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Type.Should().Be(\"Roulette\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        // MinBet izvan dopuštenog raspona i bez naziva\n        var model = new { MinBet = 0, MaxBet = 100 };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/game\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var model = new GameInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Anonimna igra\",\n            Type = aspnet.Models.GameType.Slots,\n            MinBet = 1,\n            MaxBet = 10\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/game\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateGame()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        var model = new GameInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = game.Id,\n            Name = \"Izmijenjena igra\",\n            Type = game.Type,\n            MinBet = 25,\n            MaxBet = 750,\n            Description = game.Description\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/game/{game.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<GameDTO>();\n        dto!.Name.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjena igra\");\n        dto.MinBet.Should().Be(25);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var model = new GameInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Nepostojeća\",\n            Type = aspnet.Models.GameType.Poker,\n            MinBet = 10,\n            MaxBet = 100\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/game/999999\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemoveGame_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/game/{game.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Games.Any(g => g.Id == game.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync(\"/api/game/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HiwgZQvSnjhkqR12PkYrSM"}

aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class PlayerApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public PlayerApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/player\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<PlayerDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(p => p.Id == player.Id && p.Email == player.Email);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithQuery_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n        await CreatePlayerAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/player?q={player.Email}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<PlayerDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(player.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnPlayer_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/player/{player.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<PlayerDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(player.Id);\n        dto.Balance.Should().Be(player.Balance);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/player/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreatePlayer_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var model = new PlayerInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Novi\",\n            LastName = \"Igrač\",\n            Email = $\"novi-{Guid.NewGuid():N}@mail.com\",\n            DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1992, 7, 15),\n            Balance = 250\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/player\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<PlayerDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Email.Should().Be(model.Email);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenEmailInvalid()\n    {\n        var model = new\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Novi\",\n            LastName = \"Igrač\",\n            Email = \"nije-email\",\n            DateOfBirth = \"1992-07-15\",\n            Balance = 250\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/player\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var model = new PlayerInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Anon\",\n            LastName = \"Igrač\",\n            Email = \"anon@mail.com\",\n            DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1990, 1, 1),\n            Balance = 0\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/player\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdatePlayer()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n        var model = new PlayerInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = player.Id,\n            FirstName = \"Izmijenjeni\",\n            LastName = player.LastName,\n            Email = player.Email,\n            DateOfBirth = player.DateOfBirth,\n            Balance = 9999\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/player/{player.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<PlayerDTO>();\n        dto!.FirstName.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjeni\");\n        dto.Balance.Should().Be(9999);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var model = new PlayerInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Nepostojeći\",\n            LastName = \"Igrač\",\n            Email = \"x@mail.com\",\n            DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1990, 1, 1),\n            Balance = 0\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/player/999999\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemovePlayer_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/player/{player.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Players.Any(p => p.Id == player.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync(\"/api/player/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_014e9YpyQ24FQamiYxwuDkUz"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/EmployeeApiTests.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class EmployeeApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public EmployeeApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/employee\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<EmployeeDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(e => e.Id == employee.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithCasinoFilter_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n        await CreateEmployeeAsync(); // drugi casino\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/employee?casinoId={employee.CasinoId}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<EmployeeDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(employee.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnEmployeeWithNestedCasino_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/employee/{employee.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<EmployeeDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(employee.Id);\n        dto.Casino.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(employee.CasinoId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/employee/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateEmployee_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new EmployeeInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Novi\",\n            LastName = \"Djelatnik\",\n            Position = \"Cashier\",\n            CasinoId = casino.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<EmployeeDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(casino.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenCasinoMissing()\n    {\n        var model = new EmployeeInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Novi\",\n            LastName = \"Djelatnik\",\n            Position = \"Cashier\",\n            CasinoId = 999999\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        var model = new { Position = \"Cashier\", CasinoId = 1 };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new EmployeeInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Anon\",\n            LastName = \"Djelatnik\",\n            Position = \"Dealer\",\n            CasinoId = casino.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateEmployee()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n        var model = new EmployeeInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = employee.Id,\n            FirstName = \"Izmijenjeni\",\n            LastName = employee.LastName,\n            Position = \"Manager\",\n            CasinoId = employee.CasinoId\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/employee/{employee.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<EmployeeDTO>();\n        dto!.FirstName.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjeni\");\n        dto.Position.Should().Be(\"Manager\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new EmployeeInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Nepostojeći\",\n            LastName = \"Djelatnik\",\n            Position = \"Dealer\",\n            CasinoId = casino.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee/999999\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemoveEmployee_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/employee/{employee.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Employees.Any(e => e.Id == employee.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync(\"/api/employee/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FuTnSPFEjVPcw2bsKhCyu4"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/TableApiTests.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class TableApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public TableApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/table\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<TableDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(t => t.Id == table.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithCasinoFilter_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n        await CreateTableAsync(); // drugi casino\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/table?casinoId={table.CasinoId}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<TableDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(table.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnTableWithNestedDtos_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/table/{table.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<TableDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(table.Id);\n        dto.Casino.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Game.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(table.CasinoId);\n        dto.Game!.Id.Should().Be(table.GameId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/table/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateTable_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        var model = new TableInputDTO\n        {\n            TableNumber = 42,\n            IsAvailable = true,\n            MinBet = 15,\n            MaxBet = 600,\n            CasinoId = casino.Id,\n            GameId = game.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/table\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<TableDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.TableNumber.Should().Be(42);\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(casino.Id);\n        dto.Game!.Id.Should().Be(game.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenForeignKeysMissing()\n    {\n        var model = new TableInputDTO\n        {\n            TableNumber = 1,\n            IsAvailable = true,\n            MinBet = 10,\n            MaxBet = 100,\n            CasinoId = 999999,\n            GameId = 999999\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/table\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var model = new TableInputDTO\n        {\n            TableNumber = 1,\n            IsAvailable = true,\n            MinBet = 10,\n            MaxBet = 100,\n            CasinoId = 1,\n            GameId = 1\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/table\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateTable()\n    {\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n        var model = new TableInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = table.Id,\n            TableNumber = table.TableNumber,\n            IsAvailable = false,\n            MinBet = 50,\n            MaxBet = 2000,\n            CasinoId = table.CasinoId,\n            GameId = table.GameId\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/table/{table.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<TableDTO>();\n        dto!.IsAvailable.Should().BeFalse();\n        dto.MinBet.Should().Be(50);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        var model = new TableInputDTO\n        {\n            TableNumber = 1,\n            IsAvailable = true,\n            MinBet = 10,\n            MaxBet = 100,\n            CasinoId = casino.Id,\n            GameId = game.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/table/999999\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemoveTable_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/table/{table.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Tables.Any(t => t.Id == table.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class TransactionApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public TransactionApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var transaction = await CreateTransactionAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/transaction\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<TransactionDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(t => t.Id == transaction.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithPlayerFilter_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var transaction = await CreateTransactionAsync();\n        await CreateTransactionAsync(); // drugi igrač\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/transaction?playerId={transaction.PlayerId}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<TransactionDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(transaction.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnTransactionWithNestedPlayer_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var transaction = await CreateTransactionAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/transaction/{transaction.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = dto.Player!.Id.Should().Be(transaction.PlayerId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/transaction/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task = TransactionType.Win,\n            CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 5, 10),\n            PlayerId = player.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/transaction\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<TransactionDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Amount.Should().Be(333);\n        dto.Type.Should().Be(\"Win\");\n        dto.Player!.Id.Should().Be(player.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenAmountInvalid()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n        var model = new TransactionInputDTO\n        {\n            Amount = 0, // izvan dopuštenog raspona\n            Type = TransactionType.Bet,\n            CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 5, 10),\n TransactionType.Deposit,\n            CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 5, 10),\n            PlayerId = 999999\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/transaction\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task CreateTransactionAsync();\n        var model = new TransactionInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = transaction.Id,\n            Amount = 777,\n            Type = TransactionType.Withdrawal,\n dto.Type.Should().Be(\"Withdrawal\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n        var model = new TransactionInputDTO\n        {\n            Amount = 50,\n            Type = TransactionType.Deposit,\n            CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 5, 10),\n            PlayerId = player.Id\n AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/transaction/{transaction.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Transactions.Any(t => t.Id == transaction.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class ReservationApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public ReservationApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var reservation = await CreateReservationAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/reservation\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<ReservationDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(r => r.Id == reservation.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithPlayerFilter_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var reservation = await CreateReservationAsync();\n        await CreateReservationAsync(); // drugi igrač\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/reservation?playerId={reservation.PlayerId}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<ReservationDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(reservation.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnReservationWithNestedDtos_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var reservation = await CreateReservationAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/reservation/{reservation.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ReservationDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(reservation.Id);\n        dto.Player.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Table.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Player!.Id.Should().Be(reservation.PlayerId);\n        dto.Table!.Id.Should().Be(reservation.TableId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/reservation/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateReservation_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n        var model = new ReservationInputDTO\n        {\n            ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 7, 1, 21, 0, 0),\n            PlayerId = player.Id,\n            TableId = table.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/reservation\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ReservationDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Player!.Id.Should().Be(player.Id);\n        dto.Table!.Id.Should().Be(table.Id);\n response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        // PlayerId i TableId izvan dopuštenog raspona\n        var model = new { ReservedAt = \"2024-07-01T20:00:00\", PlayerId = 0, TableId = 0 };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/reservation\", model);\n\n    {\n            ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 7, 1),\n            PlayerId = 1,\n            TableId = 1\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/reservation\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateReservation()\n    {\n        var reservation = await CreateReservationAsync();\n        var newDate = new DateTime(2024, 8, 15, 19, 30, 0);\n        var model = new ReservationInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = reservation.Id,\n            ReservedAt = newDate,\n            PlayerId = reservation.PlayerId,\n            TableId = reservation.TableId\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/reservation/{reservation.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ReservationDTO>();\n        dto!.ReservedAt.Should().Be(newDate);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var player = await CreatePlayerAsync();\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n        var model = new ReservationInputDTO\n        {\n            ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 7, 1),\n            PlayerId = player.Id,\n            TableId = table.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/reservation/999999\", model);\n\n
