{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"description":"Lab 5 auth + Dropzone UI","prompt":"You are building the Lab 5 UI for the casino ASP.NET Core MVC app at /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet. The backend (controllers, models, Identity) is already done — do NOT touch controllers, models, repositories, or Program.cs. Your scope: Razor views, _Layout.cshtml, CSS, front-end JS. Match the app's existing visual style (look at Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml and wwwroot/css/casino.css first — the app has an Evangelion/NERV-inspired theme from Lab 3).\n\nCreate/modify the following:\n\n## 1. Views/Account/Login.cshtml\n- `@model aspnet.Models.LoginViewModel` (properties: Email, Password, RememberMe — Display names already set in Croatian).\n- Form posts to action `Login` on controller `Account`, include `returnUrl` from `ViewData[\"ReturnUrl\"]` via `asp-route-returnUrl`.\n- Standard validation: `asp-validation-summary`, `asp-validation-for` spans, and `@section Scripts { <partial name=\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\" /> }`.\n- Below the local login form, add a \"Vanjska prijava\" section with a button \"Prijava putem Googlea\" inside a form that POSTs to action `ExternalLogin` on controller `Account` with hidden/`asp-route-provider=\"Google\"` and `asp-route-returnUrl`.\n- Link to Register page (\"Nemaš račun? Registriraj se\").\n\n## 2. Views/Account/Register.cshtml\n- `@model aspnet.Models.RegisterViewModel` (Email, OIB, JMBG, Password, ConfirmPassword).\n- Form posts to action `Register` on controller `Account` with returnUrl. Full validation markup + validation scripts partial.\n\n## 3. Views/Account/ExternalLogin.cshtml\n- `@model aspnet.Models.ExternalLoginViewModel` (Email, OIB, JMBG, ProviderDisplayName, ReturnUrl).\n- Shown after first Google sign-in to complete registration. Heading like \"Dovrši registraciju (@Model.ProviderDisplayName)\".\n- Form posts to action `ExternalLoginConfirmation` on controller `Account`. Include hidden inputs for `ReturnUrl` and `ProviderDisplayName`. Editable Email, OIB, JMBG fields with validation.\n\n## 4. Views/Account/AccessDenied.cshtml\n- Simple \"Pristup odbijen\" page (403), themed, link back to home.\n\n## 5. Views/Shared/_LoginPartial.cshtml + _Layout.cshtml\n- _LoginPartial: inject `SignInManager<aspnet.Models.AppUser>` and `UserManager<aspnet.Models.AppUser>` (`@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity`). If signed in: show \"Pozdrav, @User.Identity.Name\" and a Logout button — Logout MUST be a POST form to action `Logout` on controller `Account` (it has ValidateAntiForgeryToken; form tag helpers add the token automatically). If not signed in: links to Login (\"Prijava\") and Register (\"Registracija\").\n- Include `<partial name=\"_LoginPartial\" />` in the _Layout navbar, styled to fit.\n\n## 6. Dropzone upload on Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml + Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml\nRead the existing Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml first and keep its current edit form intact; add a \"Dokumenti\" section next to/below it.\n- Use Dropzone 5 from CDN: `https://unpkg.com/dropzone@5/dist/min/dropzone.min.css` and `.../dropzone.min.js`.\n- The upload form: `<form id=\"attachmentDz\" class=\"dropzone\" method=\"post\" enctype=\"multipart/form-data\" action=\"@Url.Action(\"UploadAttachment\", \"Casino\", new { casinoId = Model.Id })\"></form>`. The server action expects the file parameter named `file`, so set `Dropzone.options.attachmentDz = { paramName: \"file\", success: ... reload list ... }`.\n- Attachment list div `#attachmentList`, loaded via AJAX (jQuery `.load()`) from `@Url.Action(\"GetAttachments\", \"Casino\", new { casinoId = Model.Id })` on page load and after each successful upload.\n- Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml: `@model List<aspnet.Models.Attachment>` — table with FileName (link to `@a.FilePath` target=_blank), human-readable FileSize, CreatedAt, and a delete button per row calling JS `deleteAttachment(id)`.\n- `deleteAttachment(id)` does `$.ajax` POST to `@Url.Action(\"DeleteAttachment\", \"Casino\")` + `/...` — careful: the delete route is `kasina/privitci/{id}/obrisi`, so build the URL like `'@Url.Content(\"~/kasina/privitci/\")' + id + '/obrisi'`, then reload the list. (No antiforgery token needed; the actions don't validate it.)\n- Note: Edit.cshtml may already have a `@section Scripts` — merge into it, don't duplicate the section.\n- Check whether jQuery is loaded in _Layout; if not, use fetch() instead of jQuery.\n\nController route facts (already implemented in CasinoController):\n- POST upload: `kasina/{casinoId:int}/privitci` → action `UploadAttachment`\n- GET list (returns _AttachmentList partial): `kasina/{casinoId:int}/privitci` → action `GetAttachments`\n- POST delete: `kasina/privitci/{id:int}/obrisi` → action `DeleteAttachment`\n- These require role Admin or Manager (the Edit page itself is already role-gated, so no extra checks needed in the view).\n\nAttachment model fields: Id, CasinoId, FileName, FilePath, ContentType, FileSize (long, bytes), CreatedAt (DateTime).\n\nAfter making changes run `dotnet build` in /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet and fix any Razor compile errors. Report the files you created/changed.","subagent_type":"ux-designer"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_013GeTTAs15vWQB4VBuWKEoG"}

} });\n        });\n    </script>\n\n    <script src=\"https://unpkg.com/dropzone@5/dist/min/dropzone.min.js\"></script>\n    <script>\n        var attachmentListUrl = '@Url.Action(\"GetAttachments\", \"Casino\", new { casinoId = Model.Id })';\n\n        function loadAttachments() {\n            $('#attachmentList').load(attachmentListUrl);\n        }\n\n        function deleteAttachment(id) {\n            $.ajax({\n                url: '@Url.Content(\"~/kasina/privitci/\")' + id + '/obrisi',\n                type: 'POST',\n                success: loadAttachments\n            });\n        }\n\n        Dropzone.options.attachmentDz = {\n            paramName: \"file\",\n            maxFilesize: 50, // MB\n            success: function (file) {\n                var dz = this;\n                setTimeout(function () { dz.removeFile(file); }, 1200);\n                loadAttachments();\n            },\n            error: function (file, message) {\n                var text = (message && message.message) ? message.message : message;\n                $(file.previewElement).addClass('dz-error').find('.dz-error-message span').text(text);\n            }\n        };\n\n        $(loadAttachments);\n    </script>\n}","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01N7TEXdKTqbsa7b5MLZgvGm"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"abcf485b78e15648a","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml","content":"@* Partial: attachment table for a casino, loaded via AJAX into #attachmentList. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Attachment>\n\n@if (Model == null || Model.Count == 0)\n{\n    <p class=\"attachment-empty\">Nema priloženih dokumenata.</p>\n}\nelse\n{\n    <table class=\"data-table attachment-table\">\n        <thead>\n        <tr>\n            <th>Dokument</th>\n            <th>Veličina</th>\n            <th>Dodano</th>\n            <th></th>\n        </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n        @foreach (var a in Model)\n        {\n            <tr>\n                <td>\n                    <a class=\"attachment-link\" href=\"@a.FilePath\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\">@a.FileName</a>\n                </td>\n                <td class=\"mono\">@FormatSize(a.FileSize)</td>\n                <td class=\"mono\">@a.CreatedAt.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy. HH:mm\")</td>\n                <td class=\"attachment-actions\">\n                    <button type=\"button\" class=\"btn-attachment-delete\" onclick=\"deleteAttachment(@a.Id)\">Obriši</button>\n                </td>\n            </tr>\n        }\n        </tbody>\n    </table>\n}\n\n@functions {\n    private static string FormatSize(long bytes)\n    {\n        if (bytes >= 1024L * 1024 * 1024) return $\"{bytes / (1024.0 * 1024 * 1024):0.#} GB\";\n        if (bytes >= 1024L * 1024) return $\"{bytes / (1024.0 * 1024):0.#} MB\";\n        if (bytes >= 1024L) return $\"{bytes / 1024.0:0.#} KB\";\n        return $\"{bytes} B\";\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Lb8GHnodFX3tAnJe9iiLr8"}
